title: Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple
tagline: Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple is a Hindu temple of the god Shiva located at Chidambaram in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple is a Hindu temple of the god Shiva located at Chidambaram in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshipped as Pasupatheswarar, along with His consort known as Satgunambal and Nalla Nayaki. The temple is located inside the Annamalai University complex. The temple complex covers an area of two acres and all its shrines are enclosed with concentric rectangular walls.

topPlaces.name: Annamalai Nagar
topPlaces.description: Annamalai Nagar is a special grade Panchayat town in Cuddalore district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The town is named after Annamalai Chettiar, an Indian businessperson, educationist and philanthropist.

topPlaces.name: Sivapuri Uchinathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Sivapuri Uchinathar Temple (also called Thirunelvayil) is a Hindu temple located at Sivapuri in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The place is also known as Thirunelvayil.

topPlaces.name: Chidambaram taluk
topPlaces.description: Chidambaram taluk is a taluk of Cuddalore district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Chidambaram.Chidambaram is one of the many temple towns in the state which is named after the grooves, clusters or forests dominated by a particular variety of a tree or shrub and the same variety of tree or shrub sheltering the presiding deity.

topPlaces.name: Chidambaram division
topPlaces.description: Chidambaram division is a revenue division in the Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Tirukkazhippalai Palvannanathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Tirukkazhippalai Palvannanathar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Sivapuri in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Palvannanathar and his consort is known as Vedanayaki.

topPlaces.name: Thillai Kali Temple, Chidambaram
topPlaces.description: Thillai Kali Temple is a Hindu Temple located on the outskirts of the town of Chidambaram, Cuddalore District Tamil Nadu in India. It was built by Chola King Kopperunchingan who ruled between 1229 and 1278.

topPlaces.name: Nataraja Temple, Chidambaram
topPlaces.description: Thillai Nataraja Temple, also referred as the Chidambaram Nataraja Temple, is a Hindu temple dedicated to Nataraja, the form of Shiva as the lord of dance (cosmic dancer). This temple is located in Chidambaram, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Govindaraja Perumal Temple
topPlaces.description: The Govindaraja Perumal Temple, also called Thiruchitrakoodam, is a temple situated in Chidambaram, a town in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu, the temple is inside the premises of the Thillai Nataraja Temple, constructed in the Dravidian architecture.

items.note: Annamalai Nagar is a special grade Panchayat town in Cuddalore district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The town is named after Annamalai Chettiar, an Indian businessperson, educationist and philanthropist.
Sivapuri Uchinathar Temple (also called Thirunelvayil) is a Hindu temple located at Sivapuri in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The place is also known as Thirunelvayil.

Chidambaram taluk is a taluk of Cuddalore district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Chidambaram.Chidambaram is one of the many temple towns in the state which is named after the grooves, clusters or forests dominated by a particular variety of a tree or shrub and the same variety of tree or shrub sheltering the presiding deity.
Chidambaram division is a revenue division in the Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India.

Tirukkazhippalai Palvannanathar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Sivapuri in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Palvannanathar and his consort is known as Vedanayaki.

Thillai Kali Temple is a Hindu Temple located on the outskirts of the town of Chidambaram, Cuddalore District Tamil Nadu in India. It was built by Chola King Kopperunchingan who ruled between 1229 and 1278.

Thillai Nataraja Temple, also referred as the Chidambaram Nataraja Temple, is a Hindu temple dedicated to Nataraja, the form of Shiva as the lord of dance (cosmic dancer). This temple is located in Chidambaram, Tamil Nadu, India.

The Govindaraja Perumal Temple, also called Thiruchitrakoodam, is a temple situated in Chidambaram, a town in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu, the temple is inside the premises of the Thillai Nataraja Temple, constructed in the Dravidian architecture.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (130 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (130 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Annamalai Nagar, Sivapuri Uchinathar Temple, Chidambaram taluk, Chidambaram division, Tirukkazhippalai Palvannanathar Temple.
